channel.title: Veille métier du 2026-07-02
channel.description: Veille quotidienne assurance, finance, banque et régulation.

item.title: The EBA launches consultation on key performance indicators of Taxonomy disclosures
item.description: The European Banking Authority (EBA) today published a Discussion Paper on certain key performance indicators (KPIs) and other aspects of the Disclosures Delegated Act, under Article 8 of the Taxonomy Regulation. The aim is to consult the public on potential measures to simplify and enhance the usability of information disclosed by credit institutions and investment firms. The consultation is open until 12 August 2026. — Thématique finance ; source jugée fiable (european banking authority) ; impact réglementaire.

item.title: Lancement du nouveau registre public unique banque et assurance : REGAFI.FR
item.description: Issu de la fusion des sites regafi.fr et refassu.fr, ce registre public unique est mis en ligne par l’ACPR le 1er juillet. — Thématique assurance ; source jugée fiable (acpr - actualités).
